project_info.title: My Handmade Toy — Day Two: Corduroy's Clothes

outline.title: My Handmade Toy — Day Two: Corduroy's Clothes
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Long O: -oa- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -oa- words: boat, coat, soap, road. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Long O: -ow- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -ow- words (long O): row, bowl, pillow, window. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: OI Sound: -oi- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -oi- words: oil, boil, soil, toilet. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: OY Sound: -oy- Words
outline.summary: Phonics slide for -oy- words: toy, boy, oyster, joy. Each word has a large watercolor illustration in 2x2 grid.

outline.title: Can You Read These Words? Phonics Review!
outline.summary: Phonics review game slide with all 16 words from today's phonics lesson for students to practice reading.
